languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the Machine God. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

languages.text: "А под ними вглубь луны лабиринтом вбуриваются архивы и лаборатории, где многие мудрецы культивируют знания и проводят эксперименты во имя постижения замысла {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Бога-Машины{/g}. В них я и Нунциус провели свои отрочество и зрелость, прежде чем получили дозволение покинуть кельи, сменив их на каюты экспедиционных судов и шатры полевых лагерей. Я скучаю по дому, но не жалею, что покинул его, ибо стагнация — враг Познания".

traits.locale_text: "А под ними вглубь луны лабиринтом вбуриваются архивы и лаборатории, где многие мудрецы культивируют знания и проводят эксперименты во имя постижения замысла {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Бога-Машины{/g}. languages.text: «Y, bajo la superficie, en las profundidades de la propia luna, yace un laberinto de archivos y laboratorios en los que muchos sabios cultivan el saber y realizan experimentos con objeto de comprender la voluntad del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Dios Máquina{/g}. Nuncius y yo pasamos nuestra adolescencia y parte de nuestra etapa adulta allí, antes de que nos permitieran cambiar nuestra cámara por los camarotes de las naves de expedición y las tiendas de los campamentos. Añoro mi hogar, pero no me arrepiento de haberlo dejado atrás, pues el estancamiento es el enemigo del Conocimiento».
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: «Y, bajo la superficie, en las profundidades de la propia luna, yace un laberinto de archivos y laboratorios en los que muchos sabios cultivan el saber y realizan experimentos con objeto de comprender la voluntad del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Dios Máquina{/g}. Nuncius y yo pasamos nuestra adolescencia y parte de nuestra etapa adulta allí, antes de que nos permitieran cambiar nuestra cámara por los camarotes de las naves de expedición y las tiendas de los campamentos. Añoro mi hogar, pero no me arrepiento de haberlo dejado atrás, pues el estancamiento es el enemigo del Conocimiento».

languages.text: “而在更深处，在整颗卫星的内部，是一个由档案室和实验室组成的迷宫。许多贤者在那里钻研知识，进行实验，以理解{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}万机之神{/g}的意志。努恩修斯与我，在那里消磨了我们的年少时光与部分成年岁月。之后我们才被允许离开我们的格子间，登上远征舰船，进入野外营地。我思念我的家乡，但我并不后悔离开，因为停滞是知识的敌人。”
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: “而在更深处，在整颗卫星的内部，是一个由档案室和实验室组成的迷宫。许多贤者在那里钻研知识，进行实验，以理解{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}万机之神{/g}的意志。努恩修斯与我，在那里消磨了我们的年少时光与部分成年岁月。之后我们才被允许离开我们的格子间，登上远征舰船，进入野外营地。我思念我的家乡，但我并不后悔离开，因为停滞是知识的敌人。”

languages.text: « Et au cœur de la lune elle-même se trouve un labyrinthe d'archives et de laboratoires, où de nombreux sages cultivent leurs connaissances et mènent des expériences dans le but avoué de comprendre la volonté du {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Dieu-Machine{/g}. C'est là que Nuncius et moi-même avons passé notre adolescence et une partie de notre vie adulte, avant d'être autorisés à quitter nos cellules pour les cabines des vaisseaux d'expédition et les tentes des campements. Mon monde me manque, mais je ne regrette pas d'en être parti ; la stagnation est l'ennemi du savoir. »
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

traits.locale_text: « Et au cœur de la lune elle-même se trouve un labyrinthe d'archives et de laboratoires, où de nombreux sages cultivent leurs connaissances et mènent des expériences dans le but avoué de comprendre la volonté du {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Dieu-Machine{/g}. C'est là que Nuncius et moi-même avons passé notre adolescence et une partie de notre vie adulte, avant d'être autorisés à quitter nos cellules pour les cabines des vaisseaux d'expédition et les tentes des campements. Mon monde me manque, mais je ne regrette pas d'en être parti ; la stagnation est l'ennemi du savoir. »

languages.text: "Und unter ihnen, in den Tiefen des Mondes selbst, befindet sich ein Labyrinth aus Archiven und Laboren, in denen zahllose Weise Wissen kultivieren und Experimente durchführen, um den Willen des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Maschinengottes{/g} zu verstehen. Nuncius und ich haben unsere Jugend und einen Teil unseres Erwachsenenalters dort verbracht, ehe wir unsere Zellen gegen die Kabinen von Expeditionsschiffen und die Zelte von Feldlagern eintauschen durften. Ich vermisse meine Heimat, bereue aber nicht, sie verlassen zu haben, denn Stagnation ist der Feind des Wissens."
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

Nuncius und ich haben unsere Jugend und einen Teil unseres Erwachsenenalters dort verbracht, ehe wir unsere Zellen gegen die Kabinen von Expeditionsschiffen und die Zelte von Feldlagern eintauschen durften. Ich vermisse meine Heimat, bereue aber nicht, sie verlassen zu haben, denn Stagnation ist der Feind des Wissens."

languages.text: "そしてその下、月そのものの奥深くには、書庫と研究室の迷宮があり、そこでは多くの賢人たちが知識を培い、機械神の意志を理解するという名目で実験を行っている。ヌンシウスと私は思春期と成人期の一部をそこで過ごしたが、その後、独房から遠征船の客室や野外キャンプのテントに移ることが許された。故郷が恋しいが、そこを離れたことを後悔はしていない。"停滞は知識の敵である。
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the Machine God. Nuncius and I spent our adolescence and part of our adulthood there before we were permitted to leave our cells for the cabins of expedition ships and the tents of field camps. I miss my home, but I do not regret leaving it, for stagnation is the enemy of Knowledge."

languages.text: "Onların altında, uydunun derinliklerinde de birçok âlimin {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Makine Tanrı'nın{/g} iradesini anlama adına irfan yetiştirdiği ve deneyler yaptığı bir arşiv ve laboratuvar labirenti yatar. Nuncius ve ben, hücrelerimizden çıkıp keşif gemisi kamaralarına ve saha kampı çadırlarına geçmemize izin verilmeden önce gençliğimizin ve yetişkinliğimizin bir kısmını orada geçirdik. Evimi özlüyorum ama oradan ayrıldığıma pişman değilim. Zira durgunluk, İrfanın düşmanıdır."
languages.original_text: "And beneath them, deep within the moon itself, lies a labyrinth of archives and laboratories, where many sages cultivate knowledge and conduct experiments in the name of understanding the will of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Machine God{/g}. Evimi özlüyorum ama oradan ayrıldığıma pişman değilim. Zira durgunluk, İrfanın düşmanıdır."
